front.title: OAuth2.0 Extension for Multi-AI Agent Collaboration

abstract.t: This method extends OAuth 2.0 by adding fields to token and message flows, enabling sub-agents to act as a task group. It simplifies authorization for task groups, avoids repeated interactions between sub-agents and the authorization server, and bounds the authority delegated to the group and to each member while maintaining compatibility with existing OAuth 2.0 workflows.
